text:
Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific 
Islander Unknown, Non-Hispanic, 
or Hispanic not reported 
18 = Multi-Islander, Non-Hispanic, or 
Hispanic not reported 
19 = Multi-racial, Non-Hispanic, or 
Hispanic not reported 
20 = Hispanic, any race 
21 = Other, Non-Hispanic

Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: If the ethnicity code variable (ETHNCTY_CD) on the TAF indicates beneficiary is Hispanic, value will be 
set to 20 regardless of what is reported in the RACE source data
